title: Wax emulsion and salt resist on clay
notes: Two-stage resist technique: brush wax emulsion in a pattern onto a bone-dry slab, let it set briefly, then brush over a coloured slip or watered-down acrylic. The waxed areas repel the slip, leaving pattern. Variation: sprinkle coarse sea salt onto wet slip and let it absorb moisture, creating crystalline texture as it dries, then brush away salt crystals. Both techniques layerable.
